content: Supabase JWT verification in FastAPI: use PyJWT or python-jose. Critical: audience must be 'authenticated', algorithm HS256, secret from SUPABASE_JWT_SECRET env var. Pattern: JWTBearer class extends HTTPBearer, used as FastAPI dependency. supabase-py pattern: global admin client with service role key; call client.auth.set_session(access_token, refresh_token) or set_auth per-request for RLS enforcement.
